---
title: "Overview"
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.landing-head}
# Portfolio Theory and Covariance Estimation

::: {.landing-subtitle}
A comparative study of covariance estimation, portfolio risk, and portfolio construction.
:::

::: {.landing-lede}
This site presents the FARMSA portfolio theory project as a compact research book. The focus is practical: when the optimizer is fixed and the covariance estimate changes, the portfolio changes with it.
:::
:::

::: {.scope-panel}
**Dataset and testing frame.** 50 U.S. large-cap equities, January 2018 through December 2024, evaluated under a shared portfolio-construction workflow and a common comparative backtest design.
:::

::: {.chapter-grid}
::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Start Here</span>
### [Summary](./chapters/summary.html)
Problem framing, test design, visual comparison, and the cross-module overview.
:::

::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Estimator</span>
### [Shrinkage Estimation](./chapters/m1_ledoit_wolf.html)
Ledoit-Wolf regularization for a more stable covariance matrix.
:::

::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Estimator</span>
### [Eigenvalue Cleaning](./chapters/m2_rmt_cleaning.html)
Random Matrix Theory filtering to separate signal from noise.
:::

::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Estimator</span>
### [Factor Covariance](./chapters/m3_factor_models.html)
CAPM and Fama-French structure in place of unrestricted pairwise estimation.
:::

::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Estimator</span>
### [Dynamic Covariance](./chapters/m4_dcc_garch.html)
DCC-GARCH style time-varying covariance for changing market regimes.
:::

::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Extension</span>
### [Downside Risk](./chapters/m5_mpt_vs_pmpt.html)
Variance-based and downside-sensitive risk frameworks compared.
:::

::: {.chapter-card}
<span class="chapter-card-label">Tooling</span>
### [Portfolio Optimizer](./chapters/m6_optimizer.html)
The dashboard architecture, estimator registry, and the path to a live web app.
:::
:::
